note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

defendant.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

conditional.note: The form says '“X” the court for filing' — exactly one court box.

superior_court.guidance: A checkbox: filled with 'X' only when the fact is explicitly true; never auto-checked.

conditional.note: The form says '“X” the court for filing' — exactly one court box.

district_court.guidance: A checkbox: filled with 'X' only when the fact is explicitly true; never auto-checked.

unified_criminal_docket.guidance: A checkbox: filled with 'X' only when the fact is explicitly true; never auto-checked.

county.guidance: A Maine county name without the word 'County' (e.g. Cumberland).

location_town.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

undefined.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

3_bail_is_now_set_at.guidance: A dollar amount as digits (e.g. 1,250.00). Many forms pre-print '$' next to the blank; if so, do NOT type a second '$' (the engine strips a leading '$'). Verify against the form.

with_the_following_conditions_1.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

with_the_following_conditions_2.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

personal_recognizance.guidance: A checkbox: filled with 'X' only when the fact is explicitly true; never auto-checked.

unsecured_appearance_bond.guidance: A checkbox: filled with 'X' only when the fact is explicitly true; never auto-checked.

bail_in_the_amount_of.guidance: A checkbox: filled with 'X' only when the fact is explicitly true; never auto-checked.

5_if_released_on_bail_the_defendant_will.guidance: A dollar amount as digits (e.g. 1,250.00). Many forms pre-print '$' next to the blank; if so, do NOT type a second '$' (the engine strips a leading '$'). Verify against the form.

and.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

7_the_defendant_has_lived_in_maine_for_s.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.
